messages.text:
BL-516 — Operator Telegram console (slice 1): a phone-glanceable, single-allowlisted bot for /status /ensure /tunnel /help, supervised by the operator tick like the vscode tunnel
What it solves: WHAT / WHY: a phone-glanceable console over the fleet — read swarm health + the tunnel URL and trigger
./swarm ensure from anywhere, with nothing exposed to the network (Telegram long-poll, no inbound port).
A SEPARATE, tightly-allowlisted operator bot (its own token), supervised by the always-aliv…
Approval context: Draining your "Operator Telegram console (status slice)" brief into slice 1. I verified the tree and resolved your 5 open questions: poller = supervised subprocess mirroring the tunnel; file = operator_telegram.bb; secret = a distinct operator bot token via env (your "BL-233 secret store" was a pha…
BL-516 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-516" (or "reject BL-516 <reason>") to act.
